assumption_text: The 19 January 2024 public tally of 24,620 killed, including 10,600 children and 7,200 women, is used as a boundary-compatible stand-in for the 18 January episode end.
rationale: This is the closest matched public women/children package found for the mandatory repair episode.

assumption_text: Population baselines use pre-war or near-boundary Gaza-wide sex-age shares without a displacement correction.
rationale: A source-grounded episode-specific sex-age displacement series was not found in time to support a stronger correction.

assumption_text: Women and children death counts are treated as direct Palestinian death-context variables rather than civilian-only subgroup totals.
rationale: The episode-boundary public subgroup series does not separate civilians from fighters.

assumption_text: No adult-male residual is computed because later identified-dead reporting contains a separate elderly bucket and the January-boundary series does not resolve elderly by sex or civilian status.
rationale: Residual adult-male math would risk silently misclassifying elderly women and elderly men.
